meaning: vt.除,把...除外,反对,不计vi.反对 prep.除了...之外,若不是,除非 conj.只是,要不是
examples: We work every day except Sunday.
I like all sports except football.
Back on Kimball Mountain, with trigger pulled, the elk herd disperses, except for my cow.
Meaning he can't move anything except for one of his eyeballs and both of his eyelids.
